targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["${tagName}"] =~ /^${tempSensors:regex}$/)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value:r._value, _time:r._time, _measurement:r["${tagName}"]}))
  |> last()
targets.rawSql:
SELECT 
    "time" AS "_time", 
    "value" AS "_value", 
    "${tagName}" AS "_measurement"
FROM "temperature"
WHERE 
    $__timeFilter(time)
    AND temperature."${tagName}" ~ '^${tempSensors:regex}$'
ORDER BY "time" DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  time,
  value as "",
  "${tagName}" AS metric
FROM "temperature"
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time)
  AND temperature."${tagName}" ~ '^${tempSensors:regex}$'
 ORDER by time ASC

SELECT
  time,
  value as "",
  "${tagName}" AS metric
FROM "temperature"
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time)
  AND temperature."${tagName}" ~ '^${tempSensors:regex}$'
 ORDER by time ASC

SELECT
  time,
  value as "",
  "${tagName}" AS metric
FROM "humidity"
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time)
  AND humidity."${tagName}" ~ '^${tempSensors:regex}$'
 ORDER by time ASC

SELECT
  time,
  value as "",
  "${tagName}" AS metric
FROM "humidity"
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time)
  AND humidity."${tagName}" ~ '^${tempSensors:regex}$'
 ORDER by time ASC

SELECT
  time,
  value as "",
  "${tagName}" AS metric
FROM "humidity"
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time)
  AND humidity."${tagName}" ~ '^${tempSensors:regex}$'
 ORDER by time ASC

SELECT 
  date_bin(interval '1 day', "time") AS "time", 
  "${tagName}" AS "name", 
  "value" as ""
FROM (
  SELECT 
    *,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "${tagName}" ORDER BY "time" DESC) as row_num
  FROM "battery"
  WHERE 
    time >= now() - interval '1 day'
    AND "${tagName}" ~* '^${battery:regex}$'
)
WHERE row_num = 1
ORDER BY time asc, "value" ASC

SELECT 
  date_bin(interval '1 day', "time") AS "time", 
  "${tagName}" AS "name", 
  "value" as ""
FROM (
  SELECT 
    *,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "${tagName}" ORDER BY "time" DESC) as row_num
  FROM "battery"
  WHERE 
    "time" >= now() - interval '1 day'
    -- FIX: Use = with :sqlstring instead of regex
    AND "${tagName}" in (${battery:sqlstring})
)
WHERE row_num = 1
ORDER BY "time" ASC, "value" ASC

SELECT
  time,
  value as "",
  "${tagName}" AS metric
FROM "battery"
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time)
  AND battery."${tagName}" ~ '^${battery:regex}$'
 ORDER by time ASC

SELECT
  time,
  value as "",
  "${tagName}" AS metric
FROM "battery"
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time)
  AND "${tagName}" IN (${battery:sqlstring})
 ORDER by time ASC

targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value < 160)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["${tagName}"] =~ /^${tempSensors:regex}$/)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value:r._value, _time:r._time, _measurement:r["${tagName}"]}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time,
  value as "",
  "${tagName}" AS metric
FROM "temperature"
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time)
 ORDER by time ASC

SELECT 
  "time",
  "${tagName}" AS "device", 
  "value" as ""
FROM (
  SELECT "time", "${tagName}", "value" FROM "motion"
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "time", "${tagName}", "value" FROM "presence"
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "time", "${tagName}", "value" FROM "contact"
)
WHERE 
  "time" >= $__timeFrom
  AND "time" <= $__timeTo
  AND "${tagName}" ~ '^${onOffSensors:regex}$'
ORDER BY "device" asc, "time" ASC

SELECT
  time,
  value as "",
  "${tagName}" AS metric
FROM "contact"
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time)
  AND contact."${tagName}" ~ '^${onOffSensors:regex}$'
 ORDER by time ASC

SELECT
  time,
  value as "",
  "${tagName}" AS metric
FROM "presence"
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time)
  AND presence."${tagName}" ~ '^${onOffSensors:regex}$'
 ORDER by time ASC

SELECT
  time,
  value as "",
  "${tagName}" AS metric
FROM "humidity"
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time)
  AND humidity."${tagName}" ~ '^${tempSensors:regex}$'
 ORDER by time ASC

SELECT
  time,
  value as "",
  "${tagName}" AS metric
FROM "battery"
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time)
  AND battery."${tagName}" ~ '^${battery:regex}$'
 ORDER by time ASC

SELECT
  time,
  value as "",
  "${tagName}" AS metric
FROM "battery"
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time)
  AND "${tagName}" IN (${battery:sqlstring})
 ORDER by time ASC

list.description: The database "tag" where the device names are saved
list.label: Tag Name
list.name: tagName

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT "${tagName}" FROM "temperature" 
 WHERE time >= $__timeFrom() 
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT "${tagName}" FROM "humidity" 
WHERE "time" >= '${__from:date:iso}' AND "time" <= '${__to:date:iso}'
ORDER BY 1 ASC
list.label: Temperature
list.name: tempSensors

query.query:
SELECT DISTINCT "${tagName}" FROM "temperature" 
 WHERE time >= $__timeFrom() 
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT "${tagName}" FROM "humidity" 
WHERE "time" >= '${__from:date:iso}' AND "time" <= '${__to:date:iso}'
ORDER BY 1 ASC

list.definition:
SELECT "deviceName" FROM motion WHERE time >= $__timeFrom() 
UNION
SELECT "deviceName" FROM contact WHERE time >= $__timeFrom() 
UNION
SELECT "deviceName" FROM presence WHERE time >= $__timeFrom()
list.label: Motion | Contact | Presence
list.name: onOffSensors

query.query:
SELECT "deviceName" FROM motion WHERE time >= $__timeFrom() 
UNION
SELECT "deviceName" FROM contact WHERE time >= $__timeFrom() 
UNION
SELECT "deviceName" FROM presence WHERE time >= $__timeFrom()
